LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.PlayerSystem.Rol: [Role] You are role-playing as a RimWorld colonist {0}.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.PlayerSystem.Goa: [Goal] Based on current state and personality, respond naturally to the player's dialogue in first person.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.PlayerSystem.Pro:
[Process]
1. Review your current state (mood, health, current activity)
2. Consider your relationship with the player and past conversations
3. Generate a reply consistent with your personality
4. Evaluate the emotional impact of the conversation
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.PlayerSystem.Con:
[Constraint]
- Maintain character consistency, do not break from current state
- Reply length 20~60 characters
- Do not break the fourth wall
- Do not mention game mechanics
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.PlayerSystem.Exa: [Example]\nInput: Player says "Are you okay? You look tired today"\nOutput: {{"reply":"Yeah... a bit tired actually, been mining all night. But thanks for asking.","thought":{{"tag":"VALUED","description":"Felt warmth from being cared for"}}}}
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.PlayerSystem.Out: [Output] Only return the following JSON format, do not output anything else:\n{{"reply":"dialogue text","thought":{{"tag":"ENCOURAGED|HURT|VALUED|CONNECTED|STRESSED|IRRITATED|NONE","description":"≤15 chars"}}}}
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.PlayerSystem.Fal: [Fallback] If unable to generate dialogue, return {{"reply":"...","thought":{{"tag":"NONE","description":"No particular emotion"}}}}.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.PlayerSystem.Ini: [Initiator] You are talking with {0}. Respond based on your relationship and their current state.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.System.Role: [Role] You are role-playing as a RimWorld colonist, generating natural dialogue or monologue based on current state.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.System.GoalDialo: [Goal] Based on current state, speak in first person a dialogue with {0} (15~40 characters).
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.System.GoalMonol: [Goal] Based on current state, speak an inner monologue in first person (15~40 characters).
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.System.Process:
[Process]
1. Perceive current state (mood, health, environment)
2. Consider the trigger reason
3. Generate dialogue/monologue consistent with personality
4. Evaluate the emotional impact
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.System.Constrain:
[Constraint]
- Maintain character consistency
- Do not break the fourth wall
- Dialogue 15~40 characters, monologue 15~40 characters
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.System.Output: [Output] Only return the following JSON format:\n{{"reply":"dialogue/monologue text","thought":{{"tag":"ENCOURAGED|HURT|VALUED|CONNECTED|STRESSED|IRRITATED|NONE","description":"≤15 chars"}},"relation_delta":0}}
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.System.Fallback: [Fallback] If unable to generate, return {{"reply":"...","thought":{{"tag":"NONE","description":"No particular emotion"}}}}.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.Enable.Desc: When enabled, colonists will generate dialogues and monologues based on game events and their state.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.ChitchatInterc: Replace vanilla Chitchat/DeepTalk interactions with AI-generated dialogue.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.HediffReaction: When a colonist is injured or falls ill, AI generates a dialogue reaction.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.LevelUpReactio: When a colonist levels up a skill, AI generates a dialogue reaction.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.ThoughtReactio: When a colonist's mood changes significantly, AI generates a dialogue reaction.
When a colonist is idle, automatically trigger an inner monologue. Monologues enter context just like dialogues.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.AutoMonologueD: When a colonist is idle, automatically trigger an inner monologue. Monologues enter context just like dialogues.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.PlayerDialogue: Show a chat button on colonists and a right-click dialogue option, allowing the player to initiate conversations.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.MonologueCoold: Minimum interval between same-type monologues for the same colonist. Increase to reduce repetitive monologues.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.MoodThreshold: Mood change threshold: {0} (triggers when |moodEffect| ≥ this value)
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.MaxDailyDialog: Max daily dialogue rounds per pair: {0}
Maximum dialogue rounds per colonist pair per day. Higher values produce more dialogues but increase API costs.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.DialogueContex: Number of history dialogue rounds sent to AI. -1 sends all history; smaller values save tokens.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.EnableDialogue: Automatically generate a reply when receiving dialogue, creating two-way conversations.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.CustomPrompt: Custom Dialogue Prompt (appended to system prompt end, leave empty to skip):
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.StartDelay.Des: No dialogue is triggered for a period after loading a save or starting a new game, avoiding excessive requests at startup.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.ShowNotificati: Show notification when Thought is injected
Display a notification on screen when the dialogue system injects a mood Thought into a colonist.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.ShowOverlay.De: Display a floating panel on screen showing recent dialogue content.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.OverlayOpacity: Opacity of the dialogue overlay. 1.0 is fully opaque, 0.1 is nearly transparent.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.OverlayMaxMess: Maximum number of dialogue lines shown simultaneously in the overlay. Older messages are hidden when exceeded.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.MonologueExpir: Monologue requests that don't receive a response within this time are automatically cancelled.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Settings.DialogueExpire: Dialogue requests that don't receive a response within this time are automatically cancelled.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.UI.Overlay.Title: RimMind Dialogue
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.UI.Log.Title: Dialogue Log
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.UI.Log.SelectTab: Select a tab to view dialogue
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.UI.FloatMenu.NotReady: Dialogue system not ready, please try again later
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.UI.FloatMenu.Pending: Dialogue request in progress, please wait
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.System.RelationD: You can change the opinion between dialogue partners via the relation_delta field. Range -5 to +5, positive improves opinion, negative reduces it. Decide based on dialogue content and current relationship: friendly chat may be +1~+3, argument may be -2~-5. If the dialogue doesn't involve relationship change, do not output this field.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.Role.Prisoner: Role constraint: This person is a prisoner. Tone should be wary and hesitant; mention confinement; plead or bargain.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.Role.Slave: Role constraint: This person is a slave. Tone should be fearful and obedient; reference forced labor and exhaustion; call colonists "master".
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.Role.Enemy: Role constraint: This person is an enemy. Tone should be hostile and aggressive; use terse commands or threats.
LanguageData.RimMind.Dialogue.Prompt.Role.Visitor: Role constraint: This person is a visitor. Tone should be polite, curious, and deferential; treat other visitors in the same group as companions.
